{"id":"project-LICHEN-vw14","title":"coap_keys.c: VLA on stack risks stack overflow","description":"File: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_keys.c
Lines: 642-643

Stack-allocated array sized by Kconfig option:
```c
struct lichen_key_entry entries[CONFIG_LICHEN_COAP_KEYS_MAX_ENTRIES];
```

If CONFIG_LICHEN_COAP_KEYS_MAX_ENTRIES is configured to a large value, this could exceed the stack size on embedded targets. Each lichen_key_entry is 57 bytes; at max 256 entries this would be ~14KB on the stack.

Should either:
1. Use static buffer (already have one: s_keys)
2. Add a compile-time check limiting CONFIG_LICHEN_COAP_KEYS_MAX_ENTRIES
3. Use k_heap_alloc

Category: MEMORY - potential stack overflow","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:42:23.537442Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:42:23.537486Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-vw14","title":"coap_keys.c: VLA on stack risks stack overflow","description":"File: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_keys.c
Lines: 642-643

Stack-allocated array sized by Kconfig option:
```c
struct lichen_key_entry entries[CONFIG_LICHEN_COAP_KEYS_MAX_ENTRIES];
```

If CONFIG_LICHEN_COAP_KEYS_MAX_ENTRIES is configured to a large value, this could exceed the stack size on embedded targets. Each lichen_key_entry is 57 bytes; at max 256 entries this would be ~14KB on the stack.

Should either:
1. Use static buffer (already have one: s_keys)
2. Add a compile-time check limiting CONFIG_LICHEN_COAP_KEYS_MAX_ENTRIES
3. Use k_heap_alloc

new_value: Fixed stack allocation risk by limiting Kconfig range to 16 and adding BUILD_ASSERT; updated list buffer to use CONFIG consistently. Commit 55d2c7686
